blocks.content: A Connection (pushtopics__Connection__c) defines the authentication configuration used to connect to a Salesforce org. A Connection can act as:
As shown in the diagram, Data Sync Pro handles authentication through three paths:

children.content: Current Org: If "Is Current Org" is selected, DSP runs as the Currently Logged-in User, requiring no additional credentials.
OAuth 2.0 Flow: For remote connections, DSP utilizes a Named Credential to authenticate via an OAuth Token.

Username & Password Flow: DSP authenticates using a specified Username and Password via the SFDC Login API. This path automatically manages the creation of a Remote Site Setting for the authenticated Salesforce Org.

blocks.content: Select a connection type from the sidebar to view detailed setup instructions.
